description_long: This is a classic wooden nightstand with a rectangular top and gently curved legs, giving it an elegant, vintage appearance. The front features a single drawer with a small round knob, suggesting storage functionality. The wood grain is visible throughout, and the finish is smooth with a subtle sheen, indicating a polished surface. The legs are cabriole-style, curving outward and then inward, adding a decorative touch. The sides and back are plain, with the front being the only side with a visible drawer and handle. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for supporting small objects like lamps, books, or personal items.
description: A vintage-style wooden nightstand with a single drawer, cabriole legs, and a polished finish. The front features a round knob handle and elegant curves.
description_view_0: Front view showing the single drawer with a round knob and the curved cabriole legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain, smooth side panel and the profile of the curved legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel and the symmetrical curve of the legs, with no drawer or handle visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side and leg profile.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
